data.title: MenuSifu partners with MIXUE for U.S. expansion, as MIXUE becomes world's largest beverage chain by store count.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, MenuSifu, a prominent restaurant technology provider catering to Asian restaurants in the U.S., revealed its continued collaboration with MIXUE. This partnership comes at a significant juncture for MIXUE, as the beverage brand attains a momentous achievement by emerging as the biggest beverage chain globally.

data.title: 2025: Crypto industry transformed by hacks, shocks, regulation, and upgrades, influencing mainstream adoption.
data.description: The year 2025 brought significant changes to the crypto industry, impacting its operations and the understanding of mainstream adoption. These changes included an increase in hacks and macro shocks, as well as the implementation of stablecoin regulations and upgrades to market structures. These alterations have reshaped the industry, emphasizing the importance of understanding how crypto operates and what mainstream adoption entails.

data.title: TechCreate Group Ltd. (NYSE American: TCGL) announces fiscal year 2025 H1 results, highlighting new projects in Singapore and Brunei.
data.description: TechCreate Group Ltd. (NYSE American: TCGL), a technology consultancy and software solutions provider focusing on payment solutions, cybersecurity, and digital services, revealed its financial and operational performance for the six months ending June 30, 2025. Key highlights include securing a new Real-Time Engine Project in Singapore and enhancing the Real-Time Engine for a current client in Brunei.

data.title: Uxin signs share subscription agreements with NIO Capital and Prestige Shine Group Limited in Beijing.
data.description: Beijing, December 26, 2025 - Uxin Limited, the top used car retailer in China, disclosed it has finalized share subscription agreements with associates of NIO Capital and Prestige Shine Group Limited. This move comes after the Company officially announced the strategic partnership. The agreements aim to bolster Uxin's position in the market and enhance its growth trajectory. The Company's shares trade on Nasdaq under the symbol UXIN.

data.title: Education Cannot Wait and UNICEF provide school supplies to displaced children in Sudan, like Wisam, to support their education.
data.description: In Port Sudan, Sudan, on December 26, 2025, UNICEF, with support from Education Cannot Wait, provided essential school supplies to assist displaced children. Wisam, a student benefiting from this aid, was seen engaged in her studies with a blue colored pencil in hand. This initiative aims to facilitate the return to learning for these children, with a significant contribution of [important number] school supplies being distributed.

data.title: Ragnarok: Rebirth launched in China Dec 25, 2025 by GRAVITY Co., Ltd., a developer and publisher of online and mobile games.
data.description: On December 25, 2025, GRAVITY Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY), a company specializing in online and mobile game development, released Ragnarok: Rebirth (Chinese Title: 仙境传说：重生) in China. This 3D MMORPG Mobile game launch marks a significant milestone for the company.
